Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 202 -1 0 0}People make cooking look so easy. I thought I could just whip something up, lickety-split.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 202 -1 0 0}Hey, Ai-chan, is cooking actually... really hard?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}W-Well, that's just a matter of perspective! Pretty sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Whatever! 'Sides, it's way too early to throw in the towel![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 202 -1 0 0}If I give up now, then the only thing I managed to do was fail![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 202 -1 0 0}C'mon, Ai-chan! Let's put our heads together and turn the dang tables, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_007_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I fear it is too far gone...

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Hell yeah! We've got this in the bag. Now's my chance for a heroic comeback![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2034 0 0}No way! Stop with that quitter talk. The time for action is now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2034 0 0}Oh, c'mon, don't pull a Sanada-san on me! You'll see, I won't lose here! I'll come out on top for sure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 8 202 -1 0 0}Alright, time to unleash my ultimate attack! Eat thiiis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Damn, can't believe I actually turned that disaster of a dish into a tasty, chunky curry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 202 -1 0 0}That roux sure is one hell of a miracle worker.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 202 -1 0 0}I know Sanada-san told me to be more realistic, but you really can turn the tables in an instant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Exactly! That's why you just gotta go for it, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 202 -1 0 0}Maybe some folks prefer to pull back and try again later because... Because they're confident they'll succeed next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2077 0 0}But me? Not so much. I just kinda panic—like, I gotta do something NOW 'cause there might not be a next time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Guess that's why I like those ultimate attacks so much—they can turn things around in just one move.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 202 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 15 25 25}Maybe I'll be strong enough to pull one off whenever, wherever I want someday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems Junpei-san[n]experienced an epiphany...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Welp, I'm stuffed! How 'bout we put all this away and get goin'?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 202 -1 0 0}Thanks for hangin' with me, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}
